item.title: Racing the Clock on a Huge Sandwich
item.description: A fun food challenge featuring a huge sandwich and a race against the clock.

media:content.media:title: Racing the Clock on a Huge Sandwich
media:content.media:description: A fun food challenge featuring a huge sandwich and a race against the clock.

item.title: Dragon Pizza Challenge at Dog House
item.description: A spicy pizza challenge at the Dog House Restaurant, featuring the Dragon Pizza and plenty of flavor-packed heat.

media:content.media:title: Dragon Pizza Challenge at Dog House
media:content.media:description: A spicy pizza challenge at the Dog House Restaurant, featuring the Dragon Pizza and plenty of flavor-packed heat.

item.title: Huge Teddy Challenge Fun
item.description: Watch this huge Teddy challenge in a fun, lighthearted food challenge video.

item.title: This Burger Was Bigger Than My Head
item.description: A fun burger challenge featuring an oversized burger and plenty of flavor. A lighthearted food moment for fans of big portions and challenge videos.

media:content.media:title: This Burger Was Bigger Than My Head
media:content.media:description: A fun burger challenge featuring an oversized burger and plenty of flavor. A lighthearted food moment for fans of big portions and challenge videos.

item.title: Pizza Challenge at an Italian Cafe
item.description: A pizza challenge takes place at an Italian cafe, featuring large portions, fast eating, and competitive food tasting.

media:content.media:title: Pizza Challenge at an Italian Cafe
media:content.media:description: A pizza challenge takes place at an Italian cafe, featuring large portions, fast eating, and competitive food tasting.

item.title: Johnny Cash Platter Challenge
item.description: A large food platter challenge features multiple items served together, testing appetite and speed in a competitive eating setting.

media:content.media:title: Johnny Cash Platter Challenge
media:content.media:description: A large food platter challenge features multiple items served together, testing appetite and speed in a competitive eating setting.
